items.text:
Hello! We’re looking for actors to play a **few different archetypes** for a series of **comedic chess instructional videos**. Each of these videos will be about two minutes long, and will teach a certain chess concept (like forks, how the pieces move, etc.). These videos are meant, more than anything, to be entertaining to kids, so you don’t need to have a comprehensive understanding of chess – you just need to be awesome in front of the camera (and very comfortable with improv, which will be an integral part of the performance!)

**Archetypes:**

**The Knight**:
* Overly noble, dramatic (can never tell a lie)
* Chess etiquette, honor (saying good game, not knocking pieces off the board etc.)
* Can only move around like a knight on a checkerboard floor.

**Substitute teacher:**
* Barely understands what’s happening
* Mispronounces chess terms confidently
* Accidentally stumbles into brilliant moves
* Tries to maintain control while the board collapses

**Conspiracy theorist**
* Thinks every pawn move is part of a secret government plot
* Has strings and arrows connecting random squares
* Correctly predicts tactics for completely insane reasons
* Believes bishops are “working together”

**Guitar Riff Guy**
* Punctuates explanations with wicked guitar riffs and occasional power chords
* If actor has long hair or uses wig, could be played with hair always obscuring face
* Could be played as “stoner” if no direct references to drugs
* Could play culturally appropriate music to the ethnicity of the particular opening or tactic

**Kind, but Extremely Aggressive Grandma (or Grandpa)**
* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

**AUDITION INFO**

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you are available at that time, kindly sign up here (https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0D49A4AA2DA2F9C25-64447393-chess) and let us know what 10 minute window works best, as well as what archetypes you’d like to audition for (can be more than one).

If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Thank you very much!

Jake Unger

[[[[https://jakeunger.carrd.co/](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7Y7JCILWNd3yvE1Nh1rAFsmaii9B1hqP69vEkknXK4PWP1KH964zVA1l7Klg_aem_JSvt9qfa3ilmpl-4Rd-gfw&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4YIVuSRKBgjqgqOt70vL8Wze6e7yp3wDWXf5mVI9G2kw9V4hDNbZPAp41lGg_aem_8lt0y9Th0MenYdO8jRzXeg&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5RfwhAE6cPTf_AfSTOLxPeDNxrb0B-mCTmxEdVxvrnF4P3tgUP1xUULRdJYA_aem_a-jhprZs6s-moP5anA2myA&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7s1SxnYbzI353sR61gJPwaj3F9LYMZrMDS-EmcP30gkd9 items.summary:
Hello! We’re looking for actors to play a **few different archetypes** for a series of **comedic chess instructional videos**. Each of these videos will be about two minutes long, and will teach a certain chess concept (like forks, how the pieces move, etc.). These videos are meant, more than anything, to be entertaining to kids, so you don’t need to have a comprehensive understanding of chess – you just need to be awesome in front of the camera (and very comfortable with improv, which will be an integral part of the performance!)

**Archetypes:**

**The Knight**:
* Overly noble, dramatic (can never tell a lie)
* Chess etiquette, honor (saying good game, not knocking pieces off the board etc.)
* Can only move around like a knight on a checkerboard floor.

**Substitute teacher:**
* Barely understands what’s happening
* Mispronounces chess terms confidently
* Accidentally stumbles into brilliant moves
* Tries to maintain control while the board collapses

**Conspiracy theorist**
* Thinks every pawn move is part of a secret government plot
* Has strings and arrows connecting random squares
* Correctly predicts tactics for completely insane reasons
* Believes bishops are “working together”

**Guitar Riff Guy**
* Punctuates explanations with wicked guitar riffs and occasional power chords
* If actor has long hair or uses wig, could be played with hair always obscuring face
* Could be played as “stoner” if no direct references to drugs
* Could play culturally appropriate music to the ethnicity of the particular opening or tactic

**Kind, but Extremely Aggressive Grandma (or Grandpa)**
* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Hey everyone, I need some extras to take part in a shoot this coming Sunday, June 21st starting at 9am till about 1pm in downtown Denver.

WHAT:  Short film shooting from 9am-1pm.  The scene will be the start of a wedding reception.

WHERE: Downtown Denver.

NEEDED:  5-10 extras, ages 20-50. 

I'll provide a pizza lunch for everyone!  If interested, shoot me an email at brettmanero@gmail.com.  Thanks :)

‼️UWAGA ŚLĄSK – Nowy Serial Kryminalny‼️  
🔥OSTATNI TYDZIEŃ GRANIA🔥

Szanowni Państwo, serdecznie zapraszamy na plan filmowy nowego serialu kryminalnego.  Obecnie poszukujemy:

💥MIESZKANIEC 1 (18-25 lat)
Data: 22.06 / poniedziałek – 1 scena /
Miejsce: Siemianowice Śląskie / blisko wieży telewizyjnej 😉
Stawka: 300 zł
/ epizod z tekstem /

💥MIESZKANIEC 2 (40-55 lat)
Data: 22.06 / poniedziałek – 1 scena /
Miejsce: Siemianowice Śląskie / blisko wieży telewizyjnej 😉
Stawka: 300 zł
/ epizod z tekstem /

💥BIMBROWNICY (20-50 lat)
Data: 24.06 / środa – 1 scena /
Miejsce: Chorzów 
Stawka: 200 zł
/ zapraszamy więcej osób /

💥SĄSIEDZI (25-45 lat)
Data: 25.06 / czwartek – 1 scena 
Miejsce: Katowice 
Stawka: 150 zł
/ zapraszamy więcej osób /

💥ŚWIADKOWIE ROZPRAWY (30-55 lat)
Data: 26.06 / piątek - 2 sceny
Miejsce: Mikołów
Stawka: 150 zł + będzie na co popatrzeć 😉
/ zapraszamy więcej osób /

💲Stawki netto (do wypłaty) - płatne gotówką po planie💲 
(Wypełniamy umowę o dzieło)

📩Zgłoszenia: marcin@mascaratmedia.com📩
W tytule prosimy wpisać do jakiej roli się Państwo zgłaszają, np. „BIMBROWNIK” lub „SĄSIAD”
 
📩Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
1. Imię i nazwisko + wiek, waga,
2. aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki,
3. miasto zamieszkania,
4. krótkie info o doświadczeniu (+ np. video-wizytówka)
5. oraz oczywiście numer telefonu.

Serdecznie zapraszamy :)  

UWAGA: Zgłaszając się do danej roli, jest konieczność zarezerwowania całego dnia, ponieważ "godziny grania" i lokacja są podawane dzień wcześniej. (Oczywiście, wszystko do ustalenia drogą telefoniczną).

items.text:
Poszukujemy osób do ról:
(Ukryta Prawda)

KATARZYNA NIEWIADOMSKA (20 lat)

Wysoka, szczupła, atrakcyjna. Dba o swój wygląd i potrafi świadomie podkreślać atuty makijażem oraz strojem. Emocjonalnie niedojrzała, bezradna w trudnych sytuacjach, reaguje impulsywnie na problemy. Mimo to jest miła, naiwna i łatwo wzbudza zaufanie. Na co dzień pracuje w sklepie odzieżowym i studiuje zaocznie marketing.

W roli brak scen seksualnych i nagości.
📍 Zdjęcia: 29.06–01.07 (3 dni zdjęciowe)
🎬 7 scen
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 1100 zł netto
---
ULA (19–21 lat)

Ładna, wygadana i wesoła. Studentka, na co dzień sprawia wrażenie pewnej siebie i otwartej. Dobrze odnajduje się w kontaktach z ludźmi. Dorabia prostytucją.
W roli brak scen seksualnych i nagości.

📍 Zdjęcia: 29.06–01.07 (2 dni zdjęciowe w tym przedziale)
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 700 zł netto
---
PAULINA (19–21 lat)

Ładna, kobieca i prostolinijna. Pracuje w okienku pocztowym. W życiu prywatnym jest spokojna i zwyczajna, bez dużej pewności siebie, ale konsekwentna i obowiązkowa. Dorabia prostytucją.
W roli brak scen seksualnych i nagości.

📍 Zdjęcia: 29.06–01.07 (2 dni zdjęciowe w tym przedziale)
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 700 zł netto

📩 Zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciem, opisem doświadczenia, demo i numerem telefonu prosimy wysyłać na adres: paulina.miller@constantin-entertainment.pl

Mimo to jest miła, naiwna i łatwo wzbudza zaufanie. Na co dzień pracuje w sklepie odzieżowym i studiuje zaocznie marketing.

W roli brak scen seksualnych i nagości.
📍 Zdjęcia: 29.06–01.07 (3 dni zdjęciowe)
🎬 7 scen
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 1100 zł netto
---
ULA (19–21 lat)

Ładna, wygadana i wesoła. Studentka, na co dzień sprawia wrażenie pewnej siebie i otwartej. Dobrze odnajduje się w kontaktach z ludźmi. Dorabia prostytucją.
W roli brak scen seksualnych i nagości.

📍 Zdjęcia: 29.06–01.07 (2 dni zdjęciowe w tym przedziale)
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 700 zł netto
---
PAULINA (19–21 lat)

Ładna, kobieca i prostolinijna. Pracuje w okienku pocztowym. W życiu prywatnym jest spokojna i zwyczajna, bez dużej pewności siebie, ale konsekwentna i obowiązkowa. Dorabia prostytucją.
W roli brak scen seksualnych i nagości.

📍 Zdjęcia: 29.06–01.07 (2 dni zdjęciowe w tym przedziale)
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 700 zł netto

📩 Zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciem, opisem doświadczenia, demo i numerem telefonu prosimy wysyłać na adres: paulina.miller@constantin-entertainment.pl

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Die Bühne Weinviertel bringt das bekannte Theaterstück „Der Bockerer“  im Sommer 2026 als Wiederaufnahme auf die Freiluftbühne im historischen Brandlhof in Radlbrunn. Die Hauptrolle des Wiener Fleischhauers Karl Bockerer übernimmt Intendant Christoph Stich, der unserer Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs dazu ausführlich Antwort stand.

items.previewTitle: IVY CABAN - Lass Es Sein ( Teil 2 )
items.previewDescription: „Ich kann es nicht vergessen, wie schwer war deine Hand........Ivy...

sharedPost.text:
Die körperlichen Verletzungen waren schlimm. Doch die seelischen Wunden waren viel tiefer.

Heute weiß ich: Es gibt ein
Leben nach dem Schmerz. 
Ein Leben voller Stärke, Freiheit, Hoffnung und echter Liebe zu sich selbst.
Wenn du gerade kämpfst, gib nicht auf. Hinter der schwersten Zeit kann etwas Wundervolles auf dich warten ♥️🙌.

Stopp gegen jeglicher Gewalt 🛑

🎉 HAPPY WORLD JUGGLING DAY! 🤹‍♂️✨

Today we celebrate the art, skill, passion, and joy of juggling!

May every throw be precise, every catch be perfect, and every performance inspire smiles and wonder.

Keep the clubs flying, the balls spinning, and the creativity flowing!

Wishing all jugglers around the world endless practice, amazing shows, and unforgettable moments.

🌎🤹‍♀️ Happy World Juggling Day to the global juggling community!

#best #juggling #clabpassing #camedy #ProBros.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Across Cultures Film Festival — Official Announcement
We are excited to introduce the first edition of Across Cultures Film Festival, taking place in Bamberg, Germany on July 25, 2026.
A curated one-day event focused on powerful short films exploring identity, migration, and human connection across cultures.

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL - Short Film** 
## Male, early 20s, hearing BSL user

Logline: A trans-girl lies about being deaf in order to befriend a non-speaking BSL user.

**Casting call:**

**Grey **- a non-speaking, hearing BSL user, he's timid and naive, he can't speak due to surgical trauma as a child. He falls for the main character but it's unrequited.

**Production information:**

•⁠  ⁠Paid job

•⁠  ⁠⁠London based

•⁠  ⁠⁠Shot in: Ealing, Crouch End and Kennington

•⁠  ⁠⁠3 days work

•⁠  ⁠⁠Dates 29, 30 July 1 August

•⁠  ⁠⁠Catering provided

**Apply here:**
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3ra2JX-Z_q64e81ety_TS0-kxoCqelBH7M2DdF5p6KDnEiA/viewform?usp=publish-editor](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3ra2JX-Z_q64e81ety_TS0-kxoCqelBH7M2DdF5p6KDnEiA/viewform?usp=publish-editor)

For further information, please **contact**:
[gigi.jacques.va@gmail.com](mailto:gigi.jacques.va@gmail.com)

items.text:
Hello everyone - I’d like to take this opportunity to introduce myself and talent to the network!

My names Callum, I am a multi-disciplinary creative specialising in directing, creative directing and editorial photography with an array of additional skills. I’d like to list out a few of my current projects for those who are wanting to connect, we can find a thread to follow:

- I direct, produce and act in my own self-shot mini-series called Adaon with 2 episodes released and 4 more currently filmed and in post-production. Along with this I have a collection of symbolic, story-telling skits that can be found under the reels tab of my CallumVision account - https://www.instagram.com/callumvision?igsh=YTM0bG9oeWE2ZmV2&utm_source=qr

- Much of my creative direction is utilised by musicians and creatives who need press shoots, campaigns and content-runs. I’ve coined my own style of photography called Elemental Editorial. More on this can be found on my website down below. 

- As an editorial photographer I work with an array of artists, influencers, brands and creatives to create compelling, timeless imagery. I also have a fine-art collection of hand-craft framed prints numbered in limited editions. My first and on-going body of work is called Shades of Fae (can also be found on my website below)

- I am currently doing some SPACT training as I prepare for future episodes of my series and other visions I have. Behind or In front of the camera, I love it all and seek to continuously expand creatively. More of this lifestyle can be found on my account Camael - https://www.instagram.com/camael.me?igsh=ZzhsYmVzanBicDQ%3D&utm_source=qr

Whether you’re also a director, a fellow actor, a specialised on set or so on, I’d love to connect and keep expanding on these projects. I’m keen to get involved on more creative projects and strengthen connections in this artistic world. There’s a lot more I could share along these lines but I’ll let it unfurl in the connections to come. 

Thank you all, I’m happy to be here 🕊️
Callum 

www.callumshaw.com

items.text: Looking for experienced actors in or near South Wales must have credits in feature films or TV.

sharedPost.text:
After the success of our previous feature film we have succeeded in securing a professional crew so once the script is ready then we can audition a few professional actors as its cast. 

To secure an audition you will need to show us your credits in a well known feature films or in a known TV series eg. Casualty etc., also your IMDb page and a link to your Spotlight page unless you are a house name. 

Best if you live near or in South Wales as its a few days shoot, all according to scenes.
